description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a FunctionalTest job that runs on all branches except master, uses the python:3.6 Docker image, and in its before_script adds the Google Chrome APT repository, installs unzip, google-chrome-stable, xvfb, downloads chromedriver 2.32 and unzips it, runs pip install -r requirements.txt, executes python manage.py makemigrations, python manage.py migrate, python manage.py collectstatic --no-input, and starts the Django development server in the background; its script then runs python manage.py test. Also in the test stage add a UnitTest job with the same before_script, but its script runs coverage run --include='add_friend/*','dashboard/*','halaman_profile/*','update_status/*','main/*' manage.py test followed by coverage report -m, and it runs on_success. In the deploy stage add a Deployment job that uses the ruby:2.4 image, installs the dpl gem and the Heroku CLI in its before_script, then runs dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APPNAME --api-key=$HEROKU_APIKEY, exports HEROKU_API_KEY=$HEROKU_APIKEY, and runs heroku run --app $HEROKU_APPNAME migrate, with an environment named production whose URL is $HEROKU_APP_HOST.
